mapper.sql: article_key, concept_id, retrieval_hit_count, citation_count, answer_feedback_count, manual_mark_count, heat_score, source_paths, updated_at
mapper.insert: with usage_inputs as ( select a.article_key, a.concept_id, ( select count(*)::integer from query_retrieval_channel_hits hit where hit.included_in_fused = true and ( hit.article_key = a.article_key or hit.article_key = a.concept_id or hit.concept_id = a.concept_id or hit.concept_id = a.article_key ) ) as retrieval_hit_count, ( select count(*)::integer from query_answer_citations citation where citation.source_type = 'ARTICLE' and citation.validation_status in ('VERIFIED', 'SKIPPED') and (citation.target_key = a.article_key or citation.target_key = a.concept_id) ) as citation_count, ( select count(distinct feedback.id)::integer from pending_answer_feedback feedback where lower(feedback.feedback_type) <> 'reliable' and ( feedback.article_keys @> array[a.article_key]::text[] or feedback.article_keys @> array[a.concept_id]::text[] or feedback.source_paths && a.source_paths ) ) as answer_feedback_count, case when a.is_hotspot then 1 else 0 end as manual_mark_count, a.source_paths from articles a ) insert into article_usage_stats ( article_key, concept_id, retrieval_hit_count, citation_count, answer_feedback_count, manual_mark_count, heat_score, source_paths, updated_at ) select article_key, concept_id, retrieval_hit_count, citation_count, answer_feedback_count, manual_mark_count, retrieval_hit_count * #{retrievalWeight} + citation_count * #{citationWeight} + answer_feedback_count * #{feedbackWeight} + manual_mark_count * #{manualWeight} as heat_score, source_paths, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP from usage_inputs
mapper.select: select from article_usage_stats order by heat_score desc, updated_at desc, article_key asc limit #{limit}
